title: High Contrast PvP Pack
description: PvP Pack with Custom Textures and Utilities
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fb8db3e236308d17b58e7e814a010967af40356_0.webp)This Texture Pack revisits the main PvP Items with a sharp and dark look and enhances some features to enjoy PvP freely and with less distractions.
### Textures
- Animated Totem
- Black&White Glint
- Main PvP Weapons (Sword, Axe, Bow, Crossbow)
- Other PvP Weapons (Mace, Spear, Trident, TNT Minecart, End Crystal etc.)
- Other PvP Items (Gaps, Ender Pearls, Wind Charges etc.)
- Different Textures for The Mace (Light Breach / Dark Density)
- Custom Hotbar Icons (Hearts, Hunger, Armor)
- Darker Hotbar, Item Selector and EXP Bar
- Dark GUI
- Small Caps Font
### Main Features
- Small Held Items
- Smaller Totem Pop
- Less Intrusive Shield and Smaller Sword (Dagger Style)
- Low Fire (On Player and On Ground)
- Invisible Pumpkin and Fishing Hook
- Custom PvP Crosshair
- No Particles (Explosion, Potions, Damage, Food)
- More Visible Powedered Snow
- Fullbright*
- Less Intrusive Weather
- More Visible Cobwebs (Light Blue)

> *May not work if you have Sodium activated
